title: Traveling by Bus
content: Daniel chose to travel by bus because it was affordable and allowed him to enjoy the scenery. The journey lasted several hours, passing through mountains, farms, and small towns along the way. He listened to music, read a book, and occasionally looked out the window. During a short stop, passengers bought snacks and stretched their legs before continuing. Although traveling by bus was slower than flying, Daniel appreciated the chance to observe places he would normally never see. The trip itself became part of the adventure.
